response: April's campaign generated 45K impressions, 2.3K clicks (5.1% CTR) and 187 sign‑ups (8.1% conversion) at a cost of $12K, resulting in a $64 CAC; while CTR improved by 1.2 percentage points versus March, conversion fell by 0.8 percentage points. The marketing team recommends conducting A/B testing on the landing‑page CTA to improve conversion performance.
